creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
(In reply to Mark Felder from comment #1)
I got the information from the dictionary. The name and URL matched, e.g. this entry:

>   <cpe-item name="cpe:/a:pcre:perl-compatible_regular_expression_library:7.3">
>    <title xml:lang="en-US">pcre Perl-Compatible Regular Expression Library 7.3</title>
>    <references>
>      <reference href="http://www.pcre.org/changelog.txt">Perl-Compatible Regular Expression Library</reference>
>    </references>
>    <cpe-23:cpe23-item name="cpe:2.3:a:pcre:perl-compatible_regular_expression_library:7.3:*:*:*:*:*:*:*"/>
>   </cpe-item>

This is why I chose CPE_VENDOR and CPE_PRODUCT the way I did.
